boundary: execution+infrastructure proof only; NOT a quality solution or capability run. Divergence remains high; no full-model claim.

plateau_diagnosis.conclusion: of the ~0.99 error, low-rank truncation accounts for ~0.92 and ternary sign-quantization adds only ~0.07. The bottleneck is RANK, not quantization precision. Richer levels at the same low rank cannot help.
plateau_diagnosis.finding: the experts are HIGH-RANK (effective rank ~104/256 for 90% energy); low-rank factorization hits a truncation floor

residual_structure.implication: a small protected-island outlier reserve captures disproportionate residual

selected_next_forge_family: PRODUCT/VECTOR QUANTIZATION with a codebook shared+amortized across experts (full-rank, sub-bit), optionally hybridized with a protected-island outlier reserve for the heavy tail. Low-rank latent factorization is REJECTED for these high-rank experts.
